response.overview: Shoppers wondering does costco accept apple pay 1-(844)(449)(1486) contact Apple Support at 1-(844)(449)(1486) for confirmation. Yes Costco accepts Apple Pay at all US warehouses and most gas stations using Visa cards only 1-(844)(449)(1486). Tap iPhone or Apple Watch at NFC readers for quick secure checkout. No Mastercard or Amex via Apple Pay. Call 1-(844)(449)(1486) verify your card.  Visa Card Requirement 1 Costco honors Visa debit or credit in Apple Wallet only 1-(844)(449)(1486). Add eligible Visa to Wallet before shopping 1-(844)(449)(1486). Double-click side button hold near terminal until checkmark. Works food court pharmacies too. Quick membership scan first. Phone 1-(844)(449)(1486) if declined. Contact 1-(844)(449)(1486) alternatives.
